name: Scott Walker
subject: Giving thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Scott Walker
body:
Tonette and I would like to wish you and your family an abundance of blessings this Thanksgiving. | [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38868063:sSd_bzurN:m:1:1155937413:894B1516BE7F045816C7D9BFB45F016D:r)
---
Peter,

Tonette and I would like to wish you and your family an abundance of blessings this Thanksgiving.

**_May your home be filled with love, your bellies filled with food, and your hearts filled with gratitude for the blessings in your life.**_

Peter, I am so very thankful for the opportunity to serve as Governor where I am leading Wisconsin into a brighter, stronger future with a conservative reform agenda that is working.

In fact, **_Wisconsin is working**_ : more people are employed in Wisconsin this year than any time in the history of Wisconsin. There are many thankful families celebrating the blessing of a good job this holiday.

Thanksgiving is a time for giving thanks and my family and I have so much to be thankful for this year: our health, our happiness, and the strength and support we get from so many great people across the state and country. _Thank you for everything._

Before we dive into our turkey, stuffing, and Wisconsin cranberries, Tonette and I will be praying for strength, peace, and prosperity for our state and nation as we head toward a new year and a new beginning.

We will also be praying for our military -- especially those serving overseas. These brave and selfless men and women are spending the holidays away from their families and they deserve our utmost respect and deepest gratitude every day of the year.

>From my family to yours ... _Happy Thanksgiving!_

Scott Walker

| Paid for by Friends of Scott Walker
Lane Ruhland, Treasurer
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
This email was sent by: Friends of Scott Walker, Post Office Box 620437, Middleton, WI 53562-0437

You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Scott Walker's online community.

[Click here](http://unsub.granitelists.com/Newsletters/granite/optout/?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mhash=fd079808ab07ee1f27f07b91b43e4457) to unsubscribe.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: giving thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

On this day of thanks, let us remember all those who have touched our lives and lent a helping hand, whether in times of joy or times of need.

Let us also give thanks to the men and women serving overseas to keep us safe, to the first responders that protect our communities here at home, to the teachers and educators guiding our country's future leaders, and to all who work to make this great nation a place of inclusion, prosperity, and opportunity.

And finally, I would like to thank my supporters for all their hard work, and my family for their love and neverending support throughout my life and time in public service. I am eternally lucky to have them by my side.

Please have a safe and happy Thanksgiving.

\-- Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e36/738133e4/3360a0c7/7f85b2ae/3148261807/VEsH/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Rob Portman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
| Peter \--

Happy Thanksgiving from the entire Portman family! We are thankful for you and your friendship and support.

We are thankful for the thousands of dedicated volunteers who put in countless hours helping our campaign contact over 6 million voters.

I’m thankful for the prayers and words of encouragement I have received throughout the past two years from supporters across the Buckeye State. And most of all, I’m thankful to have the honor of continuing to represent all Ohioans in the United States Senate.

I hope you enjoy this Thanksgiving holiday and get to spend some time catching up with family and friends.

Let us also take a moment to remember and thank those serving our nation - who aren’t able to be home with their loved ones during this holiday season - and ask for God’s blessings for them and their families.

All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_16&n=1)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_16&n=2)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_16&n=3)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_16&n=4). -=-=-

name: Chairman Jennifer Horn
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Friends,

I wish all Granite Staters a warm and happy Thanksgiving! Let
us spend this day focusing on those we love and expressing our
thanks for God's many blessings. Let us keep in our hearts and
prayers those who serve our nation selflessly in the Armed Forces
to preserve our freedom, and may we remain forever grateful that
we live in the greatest nation on Earth.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your families.

Best wishes,

Jennifer Horn
Chairman
New Hampshire Republican State Committee

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Peter,

By the time Abraham Lincoln made Thanksgiving a national holiday in 1863, our country had already been celebrating this tradition for two centuries. It is one of our oldest and most cherished rituals. It helps us honor our families and give thanks for our gifts.

This year, Sheena, Jacob, Joshua, and I have a great deal to be thankful for. But we feel most blessed by your friendship and support. New friends and old helped us do great things this year, and we are humbled by those bonds of friendship and fellowship.

We give thanks too to those who serve during this holiday. As many of us sit down to warm meals in the company of friends and family, we remember those who protect us and keep us safe: our service men and women, our law enforcement officers, and our first responders. Even as we rest, they remain vigilant on our behalf. Thank you for what you do.

Thank you for all you have done with us and for us. Here's to a joyful and restful thanksgiving, from our family to yours.

Yours in service,
Eric, Sheena, Joshua, and Jacob

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/about?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=f68912272f) [unsubscribe from this list](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=f68912272f) [update subscription preferences](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/profile?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6)
